headline: Kohl's (KSS) Adds Veteran Operator Elliott Rodgers as COO Is Its Turnaround Strategy Evolving?
summary: In June 2026, Kohl's Corporation appointed Elliott Rodgers as Chief Operating Officer, putting him in charge of nearly 1,200 stores, global supply chain and distribution centers, procurement, and loss prevention, reporting to CEO Michael J. Bender. Rodgers' deep experience in retail operations, supply chain, and technology at Foot Locker, Ulta Beauty, Target, and project44 adds operational depth as Kohl's pursues its turnaround agenda and reinforces its focus on merchandise productivity,...

headline: Target Kicks Off Back-to-School and Back-to-College with Style at the Center, Newness and More Partnerships, All at Incredible Value
summary: Target Corporation (NYSE: TGT) is bringing together the brands, trends and value students and families are looking for this back-to-school and college season, with more partnerships than ever, design-led owned brands and standout assortments across apparel, school supplies, dorm and more. Backed by a standout assortment of new and exclusive products, Target continues to strengthen its merchandising authority as a destination for style, design and value.
